description_long: This is a Victoria's Secret branded shopping bag with a rectangular shape and vertical pink stripes on its exterior. The bag features two loop handles made of cord, attached to the top edges for easy carrying. The main body of the bag is made from glossy, semi-rigid paper or light cardboard, and it is filled with crumpled pink tissue paper that protrudes from the top, giving it a festive and luxurious appearance. The front and back sides display the Victoria's Secret logo in black lettering. The bag is designed to be lightweight and portable, suitable for carrying personal items or small purchases. Its structure is reinforced at the base and sides, allowing it to stand upright when placed on a flat surface.
description: A glossy pink Victoria's Secret shopping bag with loop handles and pink tissue paper protruding from the top, featuring vertical stripes and a prominent logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Victoria's Secret logo, vertical pink stripes, and pink tissue paper overflowing from the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the bag and the protruding tissue paper, with handles visible from above.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front, with the logo and stripes visible, and tissue paper extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the tissue paper emerging from the top.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Victoria's Secret logo and text printed in black on the front and back
